---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the animations or code compilation
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is, including any error logs, TypeScript compilation failures, or visual/rendering anomalies.

## Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '/...' (sandbox route)
2. Click on or scroll to '...'
3. See error (e.g. animation stalls, browser prints warnings, etc.)

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment Details

*   **OS**: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sequoia)
*   **Browser**: (e.g. Chrome 126, Safari 17)
*   **Package Manager**: pnpm / npm / yarn
*   **Node Version**: (e.g. v20.11.0)
*   **GSAP Version**: (e.g. v3.15.0)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. screenshots, video captures, browser console warning statements).
